sub_modules.fp_unpack_special: Extracts sign, exponent, fraction, and classifies zeros, denormals, infinities, and NaNs.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Handles NaN, infinity, and zero bypass cases with required exception flags.
sub_modules.fp_align: Orders operands by magnitude and right-shifts the smaller significand with sticky-bit preservation.
sub_modules.fp_addsub: Performs aligned significand addition or subtraction and produces a raw signed result.
sub_modules.fp_normalize_round: Normalizes the raw significand, applies rounding mode control, packs the result, and generates overflow or underflow flags.
